title: Gooey Midnight Citrus Syrian Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and gooey midnight-craving Syrian dish featuring red wine for a slow-cooked treat suitable for those with diabetes.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup red wine
ingredients.amount: reserves for deglazing pan after cooking tofu

instructions: Heat half the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and sauté until soft, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Reduce heat to low, add remaining oil, tofu, carrots, cumin, salt, orange/lemon juice (if using), and red wine.
Stir occasionally as it simmers slowly for about 30-45 minutes or until carrots are tender and sauce has thickened slightly. Adjust seasoning with more salt if needed.
Serve warm over a bed of quinoa or rice, garnished with fresh herbs like parsley.
